reviews.review_title: Can I please have the moderator stick?
reviews.review_description:
Today, I was in a public lobby and I saw 2 toxic players. They were saying bad stuff, so I reported them and stayed quiet. The reason I want the stick, is to stop the toxic, impersonating, and stuff. I care for others and want people to have a good time.
If you choose me, then my username is MG2 which stands for Marioglitchy2
Bought early access pass and got scammed. Plz refund the money unless the owner of app is a thief.

developer_response.body: this is a bug that is working on being fixed sometimes you don't receive the items, but if you join the discord on the message of the day our team would be glad to help you receive your items.

reviews.review_description: As someone else said, I purchased an early access pack, I have never received it. No contact details to report it. I contacted Meta to help me out with a refund.

developer_response.body: this is a bug that is working on being fixed sometimes you don't receive the items, but if you join the discord on the message of the day our team would be glad to help you receive your items.

reviews.review_description:
Overall a great game 
Gorilla tag , but with better / older updates and better physics 
Along with the many shiny rocks to allow you to be any cosmetics of your choice each update without spending real money !
A mod banned me for saying he had vpn and he did BAD GAME!

developer_response.body: this is a bug that is working on being fixed sometimes you don't receive the items, but if you join the discord on the message of the day our team would be glad to help you receive your items.

reviews.review_description: Best game ever I love it so much 😍.

reviews.review_title: I want to become mod pls
reviews.review_description: I think if I become mod I can stop the hate going around with people saying the n word and more I’m very disappointed in people saying those things and this is why I want to put a stop to it. Btw I love this game so much that it makes me happy seeing all the mods going in lobby’s and pretending not to be them and then run off.
